summary: Dependabot PR bumping ajv from 8.17.1 to 8.18.0 as a devDependency in packages/schema-compat. The ajv 8.18.0 release includes a security fix (CVE-2025-69873: ReDoS via pattern keyword with $data), tree-shaking support, and a fix for Infinity/NaN serialization. Changes are limited to package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml. However, the PR has merge conflicts and CI failures (build and multiple test suites fail).
maintainerNotes: Close this PR in favor of #14085 (Renovate), which performs the same ajv ^8.18.0 bump but is currently mergeable and more recent (opened 2026-03-10). This dependabot PR has unresolved merge conflicts and failing CI. The underlying update is important due to CVE-2025-69873 but should be merged via the newer PR.
